members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: White-painted crown/door trim above the glass door showing areas of chipped or peeling paint and slight discoloration. Runs horizontally across the top of the door opening and into the left trim.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly above the sliding glass door and adjacent to the ceiling line
members.object_text_long: center sector | White-painted crown/door trim above the glass door showing areas of chipped or peeling paint and slight discoloration. Runs horizontally across the top of the door opening and into the left trim.
